name: Korean Drug Co., Ltd.
summary: Korean Drug Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and markets medicines for treating human illness in South Korea. The company offers over the counter and ETC medicines in various categories, including anti-ulcer agents, remedies for respiratory diseases, topical agents for dermatoses, antibiotics and chemotherapeutics, hypnotics, antihistaminics, amino acid nutrients, anti-fungal agents, and home pregnancy test kits, as well as health foods. It also offers remedies for cold, multivitamins and minerals, nootropics, antipyretic, analgesic, and anti-flammatory drugs. Korean Drug Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
